name: Lever / Toggle Switch
description: An interactable lever that toggles between ON and OFF states when the player overlaps it. Uses a FlipFlop node for clean toggle logic. Prints state change messages.
blueprint_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: {{blueprint_name|BP_Lever}}
PARENT: Actor

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_ActorBeginOverlap
NODE n2: FlipFlop
NODE n3: PrintString [InString="{{on_message|Lever ON}}"]
NODE n4: PrintString [InString="{{off_message|Lever OFF}}"]

EXEC n1.Then -> n2.Execute
EXEC n2.A -> n3.Execute
EXEC n2.B -> n4.Execute

example_spawn.notes: Place at player-reachable height. Connect ON/OFF states to doors, lights, or other game systems.
